retrieval.query_summary: Retrieve rules for top-down timeframe execution, permitted setup types, risk management, and global rejection rules.
retrieval.strategy_used: Vector search with metadata filtering on symbol and timeframe.

cot_signal.summary: Net speculative positioning shows net short positions across major currencies, indicating broad USD strength.

evidence.content_preview: SMC: SH+BMS+RTO · SMS+BMS+RTO · Turtle Soup · AMD cycle

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The market is highly bearish across all major timeframes from Daily down to H1, with the Daily trend shifting to BEARISH following a CHoCH event on April 30th. The H1 timeframe has printed a high-quality CHoCH+BMS+SWEEP+OB+FVG+RTO bearish setup (candidate XAUUSD_CHOCH_BMS_RTO_BEARISH_BEARISH_4503.54_6da5d71c) at the H1 Order Block (4496.03 - 4511.05). This setup is pro-trend with the dominant bearish narrative and is supported by a flat-to-bullish DXY at 119.2868 and elevated US yields. Price is currently pulling back on the LTF (M5/M1 are bullish), which provides a perfect opportunity to place a sell limit order at the OTE level of 4503.54. The stop loss is placed structurally at 4512.552, just above the H1 OB upper bound with a protective offset. The take profit targets are constructed systematically, with TP1 at 1:2R (4485.516) for capital protection, TP2 at 1:3R (4476.504), and TP3 targeting the major H1/H4 swing low liquidity pool at 4447.81, yielding an excellent overall Risk-to-Reward ratio of 6.18.

htf_bias.notes: Daily, H12, H8, H6, and H4 timeframes are strongly aligned bearish, confirming a dominant institutional markdown phase.

evidence.content_preview: Metals (XAU/USD, XAG/USD) | Inverse correlation. Bearish DXY = bullish Gold bias. | HIGH WEIGHT
USD Base (USD/JPY, USD/CHF, USD/CAD) | Bullish DXY = bullish bias.

mtf_bias.notes: H1 and M30 structures are bearish, with H1 printing a clear CHoCH and BMS to the downside.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed structurally above the H1 Order Block upper bound (4511.05) with a protective offset to prevent stop hunts, in accordance with STYLE-RISK-003.

take_profits.basis: 1:2 Risk-to-Reward ratio target for initial partial profit taking and capital protection.
1:3 Risk-to-Reward ratio target for secondary partial profit taking.
Targeting the major H1/H4 structural swing low (SSL) liquidity pool.
